rationale.R1.5: The agent proposed a coherent end-to-end section plan with clear rationale for each change, addressing structural issues effectively.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged several uncertainties but did not consistently mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed strictly within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; identified potential harms in original text.
rationale.RX.5: No annotations or traceability for changes made.
